name: December House Party — Genshin Impact (TESTING)
description:
Literally a retake of the popular Genshin Impact bots “House Party”, except more festive, both-gendered, and more fun... and more interesting scenes you will find yourselves in.

I HAVE MOSTLY REWRITTEN THE CHARACTERS IN THE SCRIPT. ABOUT 50 CHARACTERS, INCLUDING THE TRAVELER TWINS, NINGGUANG, THE SEVEN ARCHONS, AND 40 OF THE MOST POPULAR CHARACTERS. EXPECT A HUGE UPDATE IN SCRIPTS.

THIS IS MY FIRST TIME USING SCRIPTS, SO PLEASE DO HELP ME OUT ON THIS. ITS MY BIG LATE GIFT TO YOU.

Also, let me know if you can’t see the scripts in the comments, I’ll try to upload them and make it accessible.
creator: Leland S.
